# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User wants only iconButton1-3 in the menu; iconButton4-6 were intentionally removed to avoid duplicate/extra menu buttons.
- User wants report trend date pickers (dtpDashboardFrom/dtpDashboardTo) locked unless "Custom" is selected for the report trend panel.
- User wants a confirmation prompt when setting status to "Completed" and closing after saving.
- Do not combine or duplicate `txtBoxRemarksReportsInfo` with `txtBoxAddInfo` or `txtAdditionalInfo`; they represent different information and should remain distinct.
- User wants the report trend buttons anchored to the top-right of the weekly report header when resizing.
